name: quantum-banking-monorepo
description: Monorepo containing futuristic microservices bank with React UI & Node.js API

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix gateway && npm install --prefix services/auth && npm install --prefix services/transactions && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev-backend: start npm run start-auth && start npm run start-transactions && start npm run start-gateway
scripts.dev: start npm run start-auth && start npm run start-transactions && start npm run start-gateway && start npm run start-frontend
